title: Inside India newsletter: Skyroot rocket puts India alongside U.S., China in private orbital launch
summary: Indian startup Skyroot has achieved a private orbital launch capability, joining the U.S. and China as nations with commercial space launch companies. This milestone demonstrates India's growing capabilities in commercial spaceflight and satellite deployment.
content: Indian startup Skyroot joins Chinese and American private companies in the race to launch satellites in low orbit.

zh.title: 印度内讯：Skyroot火箭使印度与美国、中国并肩进入私营轨道发射领域
zh.summary: 印度初创公司Skyroot已实现私营轨道发射能力，与美国和中国一起成为拥有商业太空发射公司的国家。这一里程碑展示了印度在商业航天和卫星部署方面日益增长的能力。

title: China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, Trump tech adviser says
summary: A Trump administration adviser has alleged that Chinese AI company Moonshot AI engaged in intellectual property theft from Anthropic. The accusation emerges as Chinese AI companies face intensified scrutiny from U.S. government authorities.
content: The allegations come as Chinese AI companies are facing increased US government scrutiny.

zh.title: 特朗普科技顾问称：中国Moonshot AI从Anthropic窃取
zh.summary: 特朗普政府顾问指控中国AI公司Moonshot AI从Anthropic进行了知识产权盗窃。该指控浮出水面之际，中国AI公司正面临美国政府当局的加强审查。

title: Alphabet and Tesla test Wall Street's patience as AI spending overshadows growth
summary: Alphabet and Tesla's stock prices declined following quarterly earnings reports that revealed massive increases in artificial intelligence spending. The companies' heavy investment in AI has overshadowed traditional growth metrics, testing investor patience.
content: Shares of Alphabet and Tesla dipped after the companies reported massive spending increases in their quarterly earnings reports.

zh.title: 当AI支出掩盖增长时，Alphabet和Tesla考验华尔街的耐心
zh.summary: 在季度财报显示人工智能支出大幅增加后，Alphabet和Tesla的股价下跌。这些公司在AI方面的巨额投资掩盖了传统增长指标，考验了投资者的耐心。

title: Oil prices climb after tanker struck off Saudi Arabia, Trump escalates Iran threats
summary: Oil prices rose following a tanker incident near Saudi Arabia and President Trump's escalated threats to bomb Iranian infrastructure. The geopolitical tensions in the Persian Gulf region have intensified crude oil market volatility.
content: Oil prices rose after U.S. President Donald Trump threatened to bomb Iranian infrastructure in response to any attacks on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 沙特阿拉伯附近油轮遭撞击后油价上升，特朗普升级对伊朗的威胁
zh.summary: 沙特阿拉伯附近发生油轮事件以及特朗普升级轰炸伊朗基础设施的威胁后，油价上升。波斯湾地区的地缘政治紧张局势加剧了原油市场波动。

title: Why we're sticking with Alphabet despite an imperfect quarter and more AI spending
summary: Despite disappointing quarterly results and increased AI expenditures, analysts remain bullish on Alphabet's long-term prospects. The recommendation reflects confidence in the company's strategic position despite near-term market skepticism.
content: The market isn't in a forgiving mood, but we're not in a hurry to leave this stock behind.

zh.title: 尽管季度业绩不佳和AI支出增加，我们仍然看好Alphabet
zh.summary: 尽管季度业绩令人失望和AI支出增加，分析师仍然对Alphabet的长期前景持乐观态度。该建议反映了对该公司战略地位的信心，尽管存在近期市场怀疑。

title: The bull market faces higher likelihood of a Fed rate hike as Iran crisis intensifies
summary: Treasury yields are approaching levels not seen since the Iran conflict began in February as geopolitical tensions drive market uncertainty. The escalating Iran crisis increases the probability of Federal Reserve rate hike decisions.
content: Treasury yields are approaching the highest levels seen since the Iran war started in February as oil prices rise

zh.title: 随着伊朗危机加剧，牛市面临美联储加息的可能性更高
zh.summary: 由于地缘政治紧张局势推高市场不确定性，美国国债收益率接近2月伊朗冲突开始以来未见的水平。伊朗危机升级增加了美联储加息决定的概率。

title: ServiceNow’s stock rises as earnings show momentum in cybersecurity
summary: ServiceNow's stock price increased after the company exceeded revenue expectations in its quarterly earnings report. The strong cybersecurity business performance stands out amid otherwise weak software industry sentiment.
content: Against a gloomy backdrop for software sentiment, ServiceNow just topped revenue expectations.

zh.title: ServiceNow股价上升，财报显示网络安全业务势头强劲
zh.summary: ServiceNow股价在公司季度财报收入超过预期后上涨。强劲的网络安全业务表现在疲弱的软件行业整体情绪中表现突出。

title: IBM lowers full-year forecast after earnings warning
summary: IBM has revised its full-year financial guidance downward following an earnings warning and is turning to artificial intelligence tools to improve productivity. The forecast reduction signals ongoing challenges in the company's business trajectory.
content: IBM is now looking to improve productivity with artificial intelligence, including with a new coding tool called Bob.

zh.title: IBM在盈利预警后下调全年财务预测
zh.summary: IBM在盈利预警后下调了全年财务指引，并转向人工智能工具来提高生产力。预测下调表明公司业务轨迹面临持续挑战。

title: IBM just cut its outlook, but not by as much as investors feared
summary: IBM's official earnings report revealed that the outlook reduction was less severe than the market had feared following the previous profit warning. The company's actual results provided some relief to concerned investors.
content: IBM’s official earnings report comes after a bruising profit warning last week.

zh.title: IBM刚刚下调了前景，但幅度不如投资者担心的那么大
zh.summary: IBM的官方财报显示，前景下调幅度不如市场在之前的利润预警后担心的那么严重。公司的实际业绩为担忧的投资者带来了一些缓解。
